directive: For every subsequent proposal draft, do not recycle generic CAD, ordinary fixed-T delta-method inference, or the already-solved Moreau-Kastler 2x3 algebra as the novelty kernel. If using a PPML global sign frontier, explicitly define the primitive timing-cell counts n_g and baseline masses B_gt (or the exact unit-level masses actually required), state the frontier as a quantified necessary-and-sufficient condition over those objects, and delimit the kernel to T>=4 or a multicohort class not resolved by Moreau-Kastler eq. (3.6). Demote White pseudo-true scores, the 2x3 formula, and ordinary ratio IF calculations to support; keep prose/comparator claims synchronized.

FAITHFULNESS ROOT FIX: the user-requested estimand is naive unit-and-time fixed-effects PPML, not cohort-and-time FE. Extend the formal population/sample objective to unit effects with within-cohort baseline heterogeneity and derive the cohort summaries from that unit-FE problem; do not relabel the easier cohort-FE projection as the target or claim it strictly tightens Moreau-Kastler. Require n_gN>0 on the relevant eventual domain, call {delta: beta_star(delta)=0} a zero-level set unless a crossing lemma is actually provided, and correct all comparator/prose fields and the Andrews DOI consistently. Preserve the explicit T>=4/multicohort primitive frontier and the bans on generic CAD, ordinary fixed-T IF, and 2x3 novelty claims.

Carry forward the accepted angle-1 v5 population kernel rather than losing it to cap bookkeeping: unit+time-FE PPML collapse, effect-dependent derivative iff, T>=4 all-positive-effect witness, and primitive zero-level question. Repair its only remaining defects by indexing the triangular array on N>=|C| (or an explicit cofinal divisible-by-four subsequence with complete W4 allocation) and presenting within-cohort baseline-average convergence transparently as an imposed deterministic triangular-array regularity condition unless primitive sampling/mixing assumptions and an actual LLN derivation are supplied. Do not restore cohort-FE substitution, generic CAD, ordinary fixed-T IF, or 2x3 novelty claims.
